candidates.why: Clearly labeled top-line revenue with substantial positive values; matches definition of total revenue/sales.
Label is ambiguous and appears to be an operating subtotal rather than revenue; not chosen as primary but listed as lower-priority candidate.
Represents financial/interest income, not operating revenue; inappropriate for REVT but present in candidates.
Interest income, not operating revenue; inappropriate for REVT but present in candidates.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Represents bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue; clearly not suitable for REVT.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the clear top-line revenue figure; other candidate lines are operating subtotals or income components, not sales.

candidates.why: Mixed income/expense bucket, not specifically direct production costs; excluded in favor of more precise COGS components.
Direct material costs associated with production; strong match for core COGS component.
Explicit COGS label, likely capturing remaining direct production/service costs.
More consistent with SG&A (overhead) than direct COGS in this context; excluded for COGS and used for XSGA_COMPONENTS instead.
Broad operating overhead bucket, not clearly direct costs; better suited for SG&A components.
Overhead-type cost, not clearly direct COGS; excluded.
By definition SG&A, not COGS.
Other operating overhead; better treated as SG&A component.
Net operating subtotal including multiple components; should not be used as COGS component to avoid double counting.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Balance sheet item, not an income statement expense; not appropriate for COGS.

variables.notes: Cost of materials and Cost of Goods Sold together represent direct production costs; other candidate lines are overhead, mixed, or financing items.

candidates.why: Mixed income/expense line; less clean as pure SG&A but related to operating items. Not selected to avoid mixing income with SG&A expenses.
Classic SG&A component (personnel/overhead costs).
Broad SG&A/overhead bucket; fits SG&A definition well.
Explicit SG&A line; directly matches target variable.
Additional operating expense bucket; likely SG&A overhead.

variables.notes: Selected multiple operating overhead components (personnel, other operating expenses, explicit SG&A, and other operating expense) and excluded totals/mixed or income-containing lines per SG&A rules.
No line item related to research and development expense appears in the provided income statement; treating XRD as missing/zero.

candidates.why: Primary line for interest expense with substantial negative values; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense related to lease liabilities; secondary priority after general Interest Expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; tertiary option if the main lines are missing for some years.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense; not suitable as XINT but included in candidates list.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense; not suitable as XINT.
Accrued interest liability, not the period expense; secondary indicator but not used for XINT per rules.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: XINT is mapped to the sequence of reported interest expense lines, prioritizing the general Interest Expense and then lease-specific interest expense disclosures.

candidates.why: Component of shareholders’ equity but not the full equity amount; better to use the total equity line.
Total shareholders’ equity; appropriate BE proxy when there is no separate non-controlling interest line.
Represents the same total equity figures as Total equity; concise owner-equity line suitable for BE.
Technical balancing row; should not be used as BE.
Technical balancing row; not appropriate for BE.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for the entire balance sheet; not equity itself.
Represents total assets/total equity+liabilities; not suitable as BE.

variables.notes: Equity matches Total equity and represents shareholders’ equity; there is no separate non-controlling interest line, so this is used as BE and MIB is set to zero.
No line item for non-controlling interests or minority interest is present on the balance sheet; MIB is treated as zero.
